text: Walking down this hallway and seeing people engaged in conversation behind glass, I feel the quiet hum of productivity and curiosity. The fire hose on the wall and the modern minimalism of this environment remind me that safety and order are ever-present, even in spaces of creation. There is a distinct sense of being on the threshold—outside looking in, both connected and separate from the work unfolding within. The anticipation of entering, of contributing, stirs a calm yet thoughtful readiness in me.
